case_title: BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE VS. SCOTT E OSHA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-07-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
